title: Pitch Stability Control
description: The flight control system shall maintain pitch stability within certified limits during all normal operating conditions.

title: Emergency Response System
description: The system shall detect and respond to emergency conditions within 100ms with appropriate failsafe actions.

title: Sensor Data Processing
description: The system shall process sensor data from multiple sources and provide accurate attitude information.

title: Redundancy Management
description: The system shall manage redundant components and automatically switch to backup systems upon primary failure.

title: Flight Mode Transitions
description: The system shall manage transitions between different flight modes without loss of control authority.
